/usr/bin/ar qc libtomo2d_core.a CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/bend.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/bend_brent.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/bend_mnbrak.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/betaspline.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/corrlen.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/error.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/geom.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/graph.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/interface.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/inverse.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/jgrav.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/lsqr.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/smesh.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/sparse_rect.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/syngen.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/traveltime.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/util.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/zeltform.cc.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/d_realft.c.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/d_choldc.c.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/d_four1.c.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/d_jacobi.c.o CMakeFiles/tomo2d_core.dir/nrutil.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtomo2d_core.a
